title: Steves Lava Chicken
description: Adds Lava Chicken - food from minecraft movie
body:
That mod adds new food - "Lava Chicken" and new building from minecraft movie 

Also, you can put this chicken into the jukebox and hear the music of "[Jack Black - Steve's Lava Chicken](https://soundcloud.com/jackblack-sc/steves-lava-chicken)"

Dev Discord: \_bromand\_
